org_id.description: LinkedIn organization id (company page). Scopes every request and is stamped onto every emitted record. Not a credential (a bare numeric organization identifier); declared as ordinary config, not x-secret, so it is available to computed_fields (secrets.* is never wired into computed_fields templating, see conventions.md §3) and to the request path/query.

access_token.description: LinkedIn member OAuth2 access token (long-lived). The refresh_token exchange, when needed, is performed by the operator/agent layer before this connector runs; only the resolved bearer token is used here.

base_url.description: LinkedIn Community Management API base URL override for tests or proxies.

linkedin_version.description: LinkedIn-Version header value (YYYYMM). LinkedIn versions are monthly.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
